items.situation: two students comparing their reactions to a mystery novel they both read

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Did you finish that mystery novel for lit class? I honestly couldn't put it down.

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: I did, but the ending really let me down. It felt way too rushed to me.

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Oh, I actually loved the ending. All those little clues from the first chapters suddenly clicked.

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Hmm, maybe I missed them. I was so focused on the detective that I skimmed the side characters.

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: That's probably it. You should reread the opening chapter. The whole solution is basically hidden right there.

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Yeah, I think I will. Now I'm curious about what I overlooked.

questions.stem: What are the students mainly discussing?

options.A: Their differing reactions to a novel's ending
options.B: How to write a good mystery story
options.C: A disagreement they had with their professor
options.D: Which literature class to take next term

questions.explanation: 两人主要在讨论对小说结尾的不同看法，A 对。B、C、D 均未出现在对话中。

questions.stem: What will the man most likely do next?

options.B: Ask the professor for an extension
options.C: Reread the beginning of the novel
options.D: Return the book to the library

questions.explanation: 男生说“我想我会重读”，且女生建议重读开头，故 C 对。A、B、D 无依据。

items.situation: two roommates working out a fair cleaning and quiet-hours schedule

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Hey, can we finally settle a cleaning schedule for the apartment? The kitchen's getting out of hand.

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Definitely. How about I take the kitchen on weekends and you handle the bathroom?

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: That works for me. And could we agree on quiet hours? I've got an early lab every morning.

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Sure. Let's say no loud music after ten on weeknights.

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Perfect. I'll write it all on the whiteboard so neither of us forgets.

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Great. Honestly, I feel better already now that this is sorted.

questions.stem: What does the woman agree to clean?
questions.explanation: 女生说她周末负责厨房，故 B 对。A 张冠李戴（浴室是男生的）；C、D 未提及。

questions.stem: What will the man most likely do next?

options.D: Write the schedule on the whiteboard

questions.explanation: 男生说要把安排写在白板上，故 D 对。A、B 无依据；C 与他早课的说法相反。

items.situation: two friends recommending a history podcast to each other

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: You have to try that history podcast I mentioned. Each episode is only about twenty minutes.

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Twenty minutes? That's perfect for my bus ride. What makes it so good?

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: The host tells real events like suspense stories. I never realized history could be so gripping.

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Nice. I usually listen to comedy stuff, but I've been wanting something with more substance.

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Then this is ideal. Start with the episode on the lost expedition. It's easily the best one.

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Cool, I'll download it tonight before bed.

questions.stem: What are the students mainly doing?

options.C: Recommending a podcast to each other

questions.explanation: 对话核心是女生向男生推荐一档播客，C 对。A、B、D 均非对话主题。

questions.stem: What will the man most likely do?
questions.explanation: 男生说今晚就下载，且女生推荐了具体一集，故 A 对。B、C 与其话相反；D 无依据。

items.situation: a student asking a friend for recommendations on a couch for a small dorm room

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: You just redid your dorm room, right? I'm hunting for a couch that fits a really tiny space.

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Oh, get a futon. Mine folds flat, so it works as a bed when friends stay over.

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: That's smart. Was it expensive, though?

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Not really. I found mine secondhand through the campus swap page. Barely used, half the price.

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Perfect, I'm on a tight budget. I'll check that page tonight.

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Good call. Just measure your doorway first so it actually fits through.

questions.stem: What does the woman recommend the man buy?
questions.explanation: 女生推荐可折叠的 futon，故 D 对。A、C 与建议相反；B 未提及。

questions.stem: What will the man most likely do next?

options.A: Buy a couch from a store today
options.B: Look at the campus swap page
options.C: Give up on finding a couch

questions.explanation: 男生说今晚查那个交换页面，故 B 对。A 与预算相反；C、D 无依据。

items.situation: two students planning what cheese and food to buy for a dinner party

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Okay, we're feeding eight people Saturday. What cheeses should we grab for the board?

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Let's do a mix, one sharp, one soft, and something mild so everyone finds a favorite.

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Good thinking. Should we get crackers, or is bread better?

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Both, honestly. But let's skip the fancy imported stuff. It'll blow our whole budget.

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Agreed. I'll grab grapes and nuts too. They stretch the board without costing much.

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Perfect. Then I think we're basically set.

questions.stem: What are the students mainly discussing?

options.A: What food to buy for a dinner party
options.B: How to cook a hot main course

questions.explanation: 两人主要在商量聚会要买什么食物，A 对。B、C 未涉及；D 中人数已定，非讨论点。

questions.stem: What can be inferred about the students' budget?

options.A: They have unlimited money to spend
options.B: They plan to buy costly imported cheese
options.C: They are trying to keep the cost down
options.D: They will ask each guest to pay

questions.explanation: 两人特意避开昂贵进口货、选便宜实惠的搭配，可推出在控制开支，C 对。A、B 与其话相反；D 无依据。
